class.name: HEGoTransformableNamedNode
class.brief_description: Virtual transformable base that stores an internal node name.
class.description:
This class is used as an internal base for named input node types.
The name field is used by C++ implementations during Houdini node creation but is not currently exposed as a bound Godot property or method on this type.
Concrete subclasses may still consume this internal field during [method HEGoBaseNode.instantiate], so naming can be part of internal node creation even when not script-exposed here.
